title: flow-orchestrator-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the flow-orchestrator-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

scenario_summary.description: Example from AGENT.md: "3-stage contract review: legal, procurement, customer sign-off; SLA 5 business days; recallable by originator" Required column: 'design-mode only'.
scenario_summary.example: "3-stage contract review: legal, procurement, customer sign-off; SLA 5 business days; recallable by originator"

audit_scope.description: Example from AGENT.md: `org` | `orchestration:<DeveloperName>` Required column: 'audit-mode only'.

license_confirmed.description: Example from AGENT.md: `true` to skip the edition-check refusal; default `false` Required column: 'no'.
